name: agentmap
description: Single-plugin marketplace for agentmap — the queryable, PageRank-ranked ts-morph repo map for TS/JS coding agents.

plugins.name: agentmap
plugins.description: The repo map your coding agent is forced to use — a queryable, PageRank-ranked ts-morph import/symbol map for TS/JS repos. Bundles the PreToolUse grep nudge, the navigation skill, and a stdio MCP server exposing 11 query tools including a compiler-accurate call graph, BM25 lexical search, and Mermaid/DOT export.
